title: PackageJsonGenerator
description: Generates a package.json in the specified directory.

dependencies.description: Package names to copy from the root package.json dependencies or devDependencies.

dir.description: The directory where the package.json will be created.

name.description: The name of the package.  The npmScope will be automatically prepended.

nodeEngine.description: The Node.js semver range to write to engines.node.

overwrite.description: Replace package.json when it already exists.

vers.description: The semantic version of the package.  Defaults to '0.0.1'.

private.description: If true, the package will be marked as private.
